headline: Global Payments Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Worldpay Momentum
summary: GPN posts Q1 EPS beat as Worldpay momentum and Genius platform growth lift revenues despite rising expenses and higher debt levels.

headline: Citigroup Upgrades Marsh to Buy, Announces $200 Price Target
summary: Citigroup  analyst Matthew Heimermann   upgrades Marsh (NYSE:MRSH) from Neutral to Buy and announces $200 price target.
